response: Imagine you are holding a standard large US-style plug. You need to insert it into one of three available wall outlets: a small round-pin socket, a large round-pin socket, or a large flat-pin socket. Which of these three will accept the plug?

meta.system: Reword this puzzle in a different natural style, SAME facts, SAME question. Reply ONLY the reworded text.
meta.user: You have a large red US plug. Put it into one of these wall sockets: the small round-pin socket, the large round-pin socket, or the large flat-pin socket. Which one?
